nodes.context: Australian outlaw motorcycle club formed in Sydney in 1969, with chapters in multiple states and countries.
Outlaw motorcycle club in Australia, involved in a 1998 bikie war with Club Deroes.
Outlaw motorcycle club in Australia, involved in a 1998 bikie war with Coffin Cheaters.
Outlaw motorcycle club, patched over the Perth Finks in October 2013.
Outlaw motorcycle club; Vince Focarelli was kicked out.
Outlaw motorcycle club; Vince Focarelli joined and later left.
Outlaw motorcycle club; member Jacques Teamo was shot at by a Finks member in 2012.

edges.evidence_quote: It was reported in October 2013 that most members were to switch to the United States–based Mongols Motorcycle Club.
edges.context: Most Finks members were to switch to the Mongols MC in October 2013.

edges.evidence_quote: The commencement of the Perth chapter caused friction between the Finks and the Coffin Cheaters Perth.
edges.context: The formation of the Finks Perth chapter caused friction with the Coffin Cheaters.

edges.evidence_quote: In October 2013 the Perth Finks were patched over by the Mongols MC and Rock Machine.
edges.context: The Perth Finks were patched over by the Mongols MC in October 2013.

edges.evidence_quote: In October 2013 the Perth Finks were patched over by the Mongols MC and Rock Machine.
edges.context: The Perth Finks were patched over by Rock Machine in October 2013.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2012, Finks member Mark James Graham was charged with the attempted murder of Bandidos member Jacques Teamo in a shooting at the Robina Town Centre shopping Centre.
edges.context: A Finks member was charged with attempted murder of a Bandidos member in 2012.

edges.evidence_quote: Marc Chabriere, who was a Coffin Cheaters member murdered during the 1998 bikie war between the Coffin Cheaters and the Club Deroes.
edges.context: The Coffin Cheaters and Club Deroes were in a bikie war in 1998.
